    calculateHIndex() - Method in interface research.Researcher
    Calculates and returns the H-index based on citation counts.

    Calculates H-index based on citation counts of all papers.

    Creates and registers a new user of the given type using Factory pattern.

    Creates and returns a new User of the given type.
